name: Capricorn Metals Ltd
analysis: CMM has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$13.1195. Risk/reward is 0.45:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
